title: Maxima
body:
# Replay your moments in game

![Photo of replay gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8708e0e9064b3654052fda4291ac3a4696ea250.png)

## Features
- The list is **NOT** complete, the mod is still in early development
- Recording of in-game moments(blocks, entities, particles and sounds)
- Replaying in-game moments
- Changing speed while replaying
- An interpolation system for smoother replays
- Instant switching between ticks


## Upcoming Features
- A replay editor with pathfinding.
- Rendering your replays
- Fix some particles not rendering


### Report issues to [the issue tracker](https://github.com/betterclient/Maxima/issues)


## Building from source 
- Clone the github `git clone https://github.com/betterclient/Maxima`
- Change directory to repo `cd Maxima`
- **(linux/mac only)** Make gradlew executable `chmod +x gradlew`
- Build the project `./gradlew build`
- The built jar should be in `build/libs/`
